song.info: with vocal by Gavin Friday

song.name: Zoo Station
song.info: with "I Couldn't Find You" intro

song.name: Even Better Than the Real Thing

song.info: with Donna Summer's ''I Feel Love'' and (possibly) ''Mofo'' snippet

song.info: with Elvis' ''Love Me Tender'' snippet

song.name: Until the End of the World
song.info: with Edith Piaf's ''Non, je ne regrette rien'' snippet

song.name: Who's Gonna Ride Your Wild Horses
song.info: with ''Jacob's Ladder'' added lyrics

song.name: Tryin' to Throw Your Arms Around the World
All I Want Is You
song.info: with Lou Reed's ''Walk on the Wild Side'' snippet, dedicated to Eddie Vedder

song.info: with Elvis Presley's  ''Suspicious Minds'' snippet

song.info: Bono and The Edge only; The Edge on bass

song.name: Love Is Blindness

song.name: Elevation
song.info: with Claude François‘  "My Way" snippet

song.name: Where the Streets Have No Name
song.info: with "Moment of Surrender" intro and The Beatles' "All You Need Is Love" snippet

song.name: Beautiful Day
song.info: with Louis Armstrong's "What a Wonderful World" snippet

song.name: Glorify
song.info: Vocals: Brittany Howard

setlist.info: Soundcheck included "So Cruel", "Atomic City", "Zoo Station", "Bad" (Songs of Surrender version), and "Pride (In the Name of Love)" (Songs of Surrender version).

tour.name: U2:UV Achtung Baby Live at Sphere

song.name: Lemon Remix

song.name: Zoo Station
song.info: with "I Couldn't Find You" intro

song.name: Even Better Than the Real Thing
Mysterious Ways
song.info: first time since 2017

song.info: with Prince’s “Purple Rain" and Elvis Presley’s “Love Me Tender" snippets

song.name: Until the End of the World
Who's Gonna Ride Your Wild Horses

song.info: dedicated to Larry Mullen, Jr.; first time since 2017

song.info: dedicated to Paul McCartney; with The Beatles’ "Love Me Do" snippet

song.name: Angel of Harlem
song.info: with "Into The Mystic" & "Dancing in the Moonlight (It's Caught Me in Its Spotlight)" snippets

song.name: Love Rescue Me
song.info: only Bono & The Edge; Edge on bass; dedicated to Jimmy Buffett; first time since 2011

song.name: So Cruel
song.info: first time since 1992; first time in full band arrangement

song.name: Love Is Blindness
song.info: first time since 2006; with "Viva Las Vegas" by Elvis Presley snippet

song.name: Elevation
song.info: followed by Claude François‘ “My Way" snippet

song.info: with The Beatles’ “Sgt. Pepper’s Lonely Hearts Club Band” and “Blackbird” snippets

song.name: Glorify
song.info: Vocals: Brittany Howard

setlist.info: First U2 show without Larry Mullen, Jr., Bram van den Berg on drums; first time 'Achtung Baby' performed in full at a show; first performance held at the Sphere; “Angel of Harlem” snippets were covers of Van Morrison and Thin Lizzy

setlist.info: U2 film a music video for new song "Atomic City". They are filmed miming to the song three times on a flatbed truck throughout Las Vegas.  It is done twice more in front of the Plaza Hotel, in front of hired extras, only Bono's vocals are live.

setlist.info: Final show of eXPERIENCE + iNNOCENCE tour. Filmed for an exclusive DVD "eXPERIENCE + iNNOCENCE: Live in Berlin". Soundcheck included parts of "I Will Follow", "Beautiful Day", "One", "City of Blinding Lights", "The Fly", "Stay", "Who's Gonna Ride Your Wild Horses", "Stay (Faraway, So Close!), parts of "Vertigo", "Acrobat", "Summer of Love", "Pride (In the Name of Love)".
